questionHtml:
What is the correct order for increasing first ionization energy?

A.  Na < Mg < Al

B.  Na < Al < Mg

C.  Al < Mg < Na

D.  Al < Na < Mg

meta.title: What is the correct order for increasing first ionization energy? A. Na < Mg < Al B. Na < Al < Mg C. Al < Mg < Na D. Al < Na < Mg
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
